question: In the boat's steering position, what does the factory reset screen show?
content:
On the helm multi-function display, the factory reset screen shows the "Factory Reset" title and asks "Reset all parameters to factory setting?" with "Reset" and "Back" buttons.<PIC>
After "Reset" is tapped, the confirmation asks "Are you sure?" with "YES" to reset the settings and "NO" to return without resetting.<PIC>
ret: "On the helm multi-function display, the factory reset screen shows the \"Factory Reset\" title and asks \"Reset all parameters to factory setting?\" with \"Reset\" and \"Back\" buttons.<PIC>\nAfter \"Reset\" is tapped, the confirmation asks \"Are you sure?\" with \"YES\" to reset the settings and \"NO\" to return without resetting.<PIC>",["Manual09_87", "Manual09_89"]
notes: Factory reset section states that this screen resets settings to factory defaults; adjacent screen image shows the Factory Reset prompt with Reset and Back, and confirmation image shows YES/NO. No old submissions or generated answer files were read.
